zh.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth於1631年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她於1657年與Georg Lang在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1691年11月21日在她的家鄉享年60歲，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth于1631年出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。她于1657年与Georg Lang在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1691年11月21日在她的家乡享年60岁，埋葬在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀貝爾費爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Barth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Franz, Erwin, Florian, Gerhard, Gunther, Klaus, Manfred, Armin, Arno.

German and Swiss German: nickname for a bearded man, from Middle High German bart ‘beard’. This name, which can not be always distinguished from 2 and 4 below, is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia, in the last four countries sometimes as a German translation of Slavic surnames meaning ‘beard’ or ‘bearded man’ (see Bart 1). See also Beard 1.
German: habitational name from a place so named in Pomerania.

variants.name: Beard
meanings: nickname for a bearded man (from Middle English berd, Old English beard). To be clean-shaven was the norm in non-Jewish communities in northwestern Europe from the 12th to the 16th century, the crucial period for surname formation. There is a placename and other evidence to show that this word was used as a byname in the Old English period, when beards were the norm; in this period the byname would have referred to a large or noticeable beard. In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates and equivalents in other languages, in particular German Barth 1.

habitational name from a place called Beard in Derbyshire (now represented by Beard Hall and Beardwood Farms in New Mills parish), which derives its name by dissimilation from Old English brerd ‘rim, bank’.

variants.name: Bart
meanings: German: variant of Barth 1 ‘beard’. This name, which can not be always distinguished from 3 below, is also found in Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia, sometimes as a German translation of Slavic surnames meaning ‘beard’ or ‘bearded man’, e.g. Polish Broda , Czech and Slovak Bradáč, Slovenian Bradač (see Bradac ).
North German: from the personal name Bart, a short form of ancient Germanic names based on the element bert ‘bright, brilliant’, as for example Barthold .

Dutch, German, English, French, Polish, Sorbian, and Slovak; Czech (Bárt): from the personal name Bart (Czech Bárt), a vernacular short form of local variants of Latin Bartholomaeus (see Bartholomew ). This may also be the origin of a homonymous Slovenian surname (see 1 above).

variants.name: Borth
meanings: German: perhaps a variant of   Barth  .
North German: topographic name from Middle Low German borde ‘legal and administrative district’ (compare modern German Börde ‘district’), also in the sense of ‘limit’ or ‘border’.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth was born in 1631, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse. She married Georg Lang in 1657, in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died on 21 November 1691, in her hometown, at the age of 60, and was buried in Beerfelden, Erbach, Grand Duchy of Hesse.

fr.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth est née en 1631, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Elle a épousé Georg Lang en 1657, à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée le 21 novembre 1691, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

de.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth wurde 1631 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen geboren. Sie hat 1657 in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen Georg Lang geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb am 21. November 1691 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth è nata il nel 1631 nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Lei sposato Georg Lang nel 1657, nel Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì il 21 novembre 1691, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barthは1631年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンで生まれた。1657年にグロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンでGeorg Langと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1691年11月21日に故郷で60歳で死去し，グロssハーゾグトゥム ヘセンクレイス エルバチビールフエルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth(은)는 1631년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1657년 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에서 Georg Lang(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1691년 11월 21일 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 그로ss헤어즈그투 헤센 크레이스 르바치 브이르펠든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth nasceu em 1631, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Ela casou-se com Georg Lang em 1657, em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1691, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.

ru.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth родилась в 1631 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Georg Lang в 1657 г. в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла 21 ноября 1691 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности бирфелден, крис эрбач, гроssхирзогтум хессен.

es.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Barth nació en 1631, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Se casó con Georg Lang en 1657, en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1691, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Großherzogtum Hessen.
